mnemonics: Tread carefully (T) not to starve or fork too many threads (R) at once
CPU time is limited, so avoid waking threads too often (P)
keyPoints: Preemption Pause (Preemption: OS wakes up a thread, Pause: it resumes execution)
Starvation Forking (Starvation: thread waits forever, Forking: OS switches between threads)
Deadlocks Livelocks (Deadlocks: threads wait indefinitely, Livelocks: threads yield to other threads temporarily)
